mainEntity.name: How frequently should San Diego firms refresh GEO content?
mainEntity.text: How frequently should San Diego firms refresh GEO content?

acceptedAnswer.text: Bi-weekly for news/practices, monthly for evergreen; maintains top AI citations.

suggestedAnswer.text: San Diego: Tie to CA court calendars. Freshness algorithm factor; stale drops 40%. Automate with CMS plugins.

name: GEO Content Refresh Frequency San Diego
description: Bi-weekly for news/practices, monthly for evergreen; maintains top AI citations.
